Appliances and Programs CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: appliances and programs - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
277 H4 H4_CHANGE_URINARY (H4) Change in Urinary Continence CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: change in urinary continence since last assessment. 0 = No Change, 1 = Improved, 2 = Deteriorated, "-" = Unknown.
